---
title: "Deep Learning --- Neural Networks Explained"
subtitle: "[These slides are interactive and must load a full version of R plus some packages. Please wait until complete (see the  lower right corner of the screen for progress)]{style='color: red;'}"

author:
  name: "Carsten Lange"
  email: "clange@cpp.edu"
  affiliation: "Cal Poly, Pomona"

format: 
  live-revealjs:
    theme: [moon, ../CustomCL.scss]
    smaller: true
    controls: true
    chalkboard:
      theme: whiteboard
      boardmarker-width: 2.7
    

    
    incremental: false
    scrollable: true
    footer: "<a href='https://ai.lange-analytics.com/htmlbook/DeepLearn.html' target='_blank'>Textbook </a> "
   
webr:
  packages: ['dplyr', 'rsample', 'janitor',  'recipes', 'broom',
             'yardstick','parsnip','workflows', 'NeuralNetTools',
             'ggplot2'] # Auto-install packages in the browser

engine: knitr
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}




## Data

```{webr}
#| echo: false
#| auto-run: true
set.seed(888)
DataDiamonds=diamonds%>% 
  sample_n(1000) %>%
  clean_names("upper_camel") %>%
  select(Price,Cut,Color,Clarity,Carat) %>% 
  mutate(Cut=as.integer(Cut),Color=as.integer(Color),
         Clarity=as.integer(Clarity))


set.seed(888)
Split70=DataDiamonds %>%
  initial_split(prop = 0.7, strata = Price, breaks = 5)
DataTrain=training(Split70)
DataTest=testing(Split70)

RecipeDiamonds=recipe(Price ~ ., data = DataTrain) %>%
  step_normalize(all_predictors())

ModelDesignNN= mlp(hidden_units = 3,epochs = 100) %>% 
  set_engine("nnet") %>%
  set_mode("regression")

WFModelNN=workflow() %>% 
  add_model(ModelDesignNN) %>% 
  add_recipe(RecipeDiamonds) %>%
  fit(DataTrain)
```

```{webr}
set.seed(888)
DataDiamonds=diamonds%>% 
  sample_n(1000) %>%
  clean_names("upper_camel") %>%
  select(Price,Cut,Color,Clarity,Carat) %>% 
  mutate(Cut=as.integer(Cut),Color=as.integer(Color),
         Clarity=as.integer(Clarity))


set.seed(888)
Split70=DataDiamonds %>%
  initial_split(prop = 0.7, strata = Price, breaks = 5)
DataTrain=training(Split70)
DataTest=testing(Split70)
head(DataTrain)
```

## Diamond Prices and Carat {.smaller}



```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| auto-run: true
ggplot(aes(x=Carat, y=Price), data=DataDiamonds)+
geom_point(size=0.2)+
geom_smooth(method="loess", se=FALSE)
```

## Diamond Prices and Clarity {.smaller}



```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| auto-run: true
ggplot(aes(x=Clarity, y=Price), data=DataDiamonds)+
geom_point(size=0.2)+
geom_smooth(method="loess", se=FALSE)
```

## Diamond Prices and Cut  {.smaller}


```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
ggplot(aes(x=Cut, y=Price), data=DataDiamonds)+
geom_point(size=0.2)+
geom_smooth(method="loess", se=FALSE)
```

## Diamond Prices and Color  {.smaller}



```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
ggplot(aes(x=Color, y=Price), data=DataDiamonds)+
geom_point(size=0.2)+
geom_smooth(method="loess", se=FALSE)
```

## Neural Network Workflow

```{webr}
RecipeDiamonds=recipe(Price ~ ., data = DataTrain) %>%
  step_normalize(all_predictors())

ModelDesignNN= mlp(hidden_units = 2,epochs = 100) %>% 
  set_engine("nnet") %>%
  set_mode("regression")

WFModelNN=workflow() %>% 
  add_model(ModelDesignNN) %>% 
  add_recipe(RecipeDiamonds) %>%
  fit(DataTrain)
print(WFModelNN)
```

## Fitted Model: $\beta$-Parameters (Weights) 

```{webr}
NeuralNetTools::plotnet(extract_fit_engine(WFModelNN), pos_col = 'blue', neg_col = 'red')
NeuralNetTools::neuralweights(extract_fit_engine(WFModelNN)) 
```

## Predictive Quality on the Test Data


```{webr}
DataTestWithPred=augment(WFModelNN, new_data=DataTest)
metrics(DataTestWithPred, truth = Price, estimate = .pred)
```
